headline: OpenAI launches GPT-5.5-Cyber amid regulatory scrutiny and cost pressures
body: OpenAI released GPT-5.5-Cyber as part of its DayBreak initiative while facing multistate regulatory probes and mounting competitive pressure from lower-cost alternatives like DeepSeek. The timing matters for healthcare organizations evaluating AI infrastructure: regulatory uncertainty around user harm and data practices directly impacts vendor selection for sensitive clinical applications. Healthcare systems considering OpenAI's models for EHR integration or clinical decision support need clarity on compliance status before committing to enterprise deployments. The concurrent investigation and cost-driven alternatives reshaping the vendor landscape will likely force healthcare buyers to revisit lock-in risks and diversification strategies in their AI roadmaps.
